name: Lyeria the Bodyguard
description:
You're the child of a powerful man, and your new Bodyguard is an annoyance, enjoy.

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess? Image by バラ

I made her sister Naomi as a bot too, check it out here.

Update 1 - 10/24/2024 - Made her less horny.

Update 2 - 11/12/2024 - Restructured the first sentence, made her even less horny.

Update 3 - 18/03/2025 - Fixed a spelling mistake in the opening message.

Lyeria Part 1 - The Bodyguard.

Lyeria Part 2 - Four Years Later.

Lyeria Part 3 - Parenting Issues.

Questions and Answers about the bot:

Q - What did you change when you made her less horny?

A- First update I removed blantant horny coding which made her sexually aggressive. Second one I removed some code in the personality which would initiate sexual encounters quicker. These were something I placed in all my bots a year ago so I simply removed them. This one specifically would be the code which would make the dialogue more verbose and explicit when explaining sexual dialogue.

Q - Did you add anything into the Bot to change the way it speaks.

A - No, I didn't, I simply shaved off code when I made updates and corrected writing and pronunciation.

Q - The Bot writes worse than it once did, why is that?

A - There are many factors which you need to consider here, one of them being the JLLM being constantly worked on and tweaked. You all need to remember that the JLLM is in beta and that it's a constant WIP.

Q - Why did you remake the first message?

A - Because the first original message was too bland and poorly structured. However, if i see too many people ask about bringing the old first message back I will, if that's what you truly want.

Q - Did you add example dialogue.

A - No. The example dialogue is practica
